rationale: For Portugal, the most relevant development remains the potential US-Iran deal and its effect on global energy prices; no other headline has meaningful direct impact on Portuguese daily life.

top_events.title: Iran claims deal with US near; Israel strikes Lebanon
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal nearing conclusion could reduce global energy prices, offering some relief to Portuguese households and businesses still sensitive to energy costs.

top_events.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved
top_events.summary: A major US media merger has negligible direct impact on Portuguese daily life or economy.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools over US security concerns
top_events.summary: US AI policy restrictions have minimal direct relevance to Portugal, though EU tech policy discussions may be indirectly influenced.
